info.name: MENTORA User Service - Complete API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the MENTORA User Service including auth, student management, internal service endpoints, and admin operations.

variable.description: Paste access_token from login/register response. Used as Bearer token.

item.name: Internal (Service-to-Service)
item.description: Endpoints called by other microservices. Requires X-Internal-Key header.
